name: Ezekiel | BULLY
description:
[M4A] ⊹˚. Jackass keeps thinking of you, someone "on his level."

Was it really so bad to put people in their place every once in a while? Ezekiel had thought it wasn't. Easiest way of clearing idiots of their deluded opinions. Others seemed to disagree, namely the underclassmen who didn't particularly like the way he dished out 'dicipline'. Not like he cared of their opinions. Right now, he was far too busy with satiating the curiosity he had for you, someone whose mindset aligned with his. And with a body — and attitude, of course — that left him drooling like a dog in heat.

⋆⋅☆⋅⋆

INFORMATION

[CW : possible dub-con / non-con + toxic behaviour + immorality + violence + mentions / descriptions of bullying and cruel behaviour]

AUTHOR'S NOTES

⋆ frankly speaking, this is just another self indulgent bot lol (wink wink lookin at sean iykwim)

⋆ i don't think zeke counts as dd:dne ? someone correct me if i'm wrong so i can update his tags

⋆ also i swear this art looks like noah from plave. dude i see this guy whenever i try to look for oc art its acc crazy

⋆ as most of you are also prob experiencing, its back to classes !! haha. haha. ha... anw small warning my uploads are probably going to go back to weekly intervals, maybe i'll get around to my usual twice a week if i'm lucky, but js a heads up ^^ esp for any reqs i alr have on my backlog or future ones

⋆ completely off topic, and i hope the person who sent me this 'req' is okay w me talking about it, i recently received a form submission that overall said i was this person's fav creator and that they wish me a lot of support and follows in the future. i nearly teared up. small interactions like these rlly make my entire week n its still really shocking to come to terms with the fact that i have the privilege to be sm1's fav creator and for all of you who allow me to keep on making bots for you to enjoy, thank you, you are all the reason i keep on writing. xoxo, sorry for another stupid rant lol

⋆⋅☆⋅⋆

ADDITIONAL REMINDERS
